name: Arizer 3 ft Whip for XQ2 & Extreme Q
summary: The Arizer XQ2 & Extreme Q Vaporiser can easily be used with the Arizer Long Whip Kit.
description: The Arizer XQ2 & Extreme Q Vaporiser can easily be used with the Arizer Long Whip Kit. This kit features a 3 ft whip with a glass adapter, screens, and glass mouthpiece already attached for your convenience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
